---
title: Format for resubmission cover letter
description: "required for Revisions needed marks"
categories: [general use]
---

In a document, put the name of the assignment you want to resubmit and "resubmission cover letter" in the title (e.g. "Individual assignment 2 resubmission cover letter").  

**For each component that you want to redo** for the _possibility_ of getting full marks, you will need to articulate (in 1-2 sentences):

1. what you got wrong
2. what you need to do to fix it
3. why that fix would improve the quality of your work (_independently of the grade you received_)

For example, if you got "partial marks" for multiple plots where you had overlapping axis labels, a reasonable request would be:

1. My x-axis labels for Problem 2a, 3b, and 5c were overlapping.
2. For 2a, I need to either spread out the x-axis or fix the way I read in the data to make sure the columns are correct (so that the date column is read in as a date rather than a character). For 3b and 5c, I need to create a line break in the axis label.
3. Making sure the x-axis labels don't overlap improves the figure because the text would be readable.
